title: Dhammapada, Chapter 9: Evil
description: Chapter 9 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 9 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Make haste in doing good. Restrain your mind from evil. If a person is slow in doing good, the mind finds pleasure in evil.
